arts.ttl: Arsenal strike deal to hire new sporting director
arts.sum: Arsenal's near four-month search for a sporting director to succeed Edu looks set to come to an end.

arts.ttl: 'I understand Rasmus Hojlund's anger with Diogo Dalot – I experienced the same thing'
arts.sum: Manchester United striker Rasmus Hojlund's misfiring form continued this week with little help from Diogo Dalot, and one former Premier League hitman emphasises with the youngster

arts.ttl: “I don’t know” – Man United star opens door to summer exit with latest comments
arts.sum: Manchester United are set to go through a major overhaul of the squad in the summer transfer window. A number of players are expected to leave the club including the likes of midfielders Christian Eriksen and Casemiro. Defenders Jonny Evans and Victor Lindelof are also coming towards the end of their time at Old Trafford. arts.sum: Chelsea insiders have been discussing the recent form of Pedro Neto, who has been impressing in a new role on the pitch under Enzo Maresca....

arts.ttl: Manchester United protest live fans march against Glazers ahead of Arsenal fixture
arts.sum: Live updates from Old Trafford as Man United supporters gather to protest against the club's ownership ahead of the Premier League clash with Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta's influence clear at Arsenal ahead of new sporting director's arrival
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has a huge influence at Arsenal, with the Gunners boss involved in the decision to appoint former Atletico Madrid chief Andrea Berta as their sporting director

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag was planning a TEN-YEAR stay at Man United, reveals his former coach - as he hails the Dutchman's 'passion' and 'dedication'
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag planned to be Manchester United's manager for the next 10 years, prior to his sacking last year, according to a former Red Devils first-team coach who worked under him.

arts.ttl: Arsenal risk losing new sporting director, Fabrizio Romano responds
arts.sum: The Transfers Podcast revealed this week that Andrea Berta had ended talks with AC Milan as he has received an offer to become Arsenal’s new sporting director. There are sensational reports that Arsenal could lose 'new' sporting director Andrea Berta to a last-minute hijack from AC Milan, but Fabrizio Romano has rejected the claims.

arts.ttl: Manchester United vs Arsenal LIVE: Premier League team news and line-up as rivals clash at Old Trafford
arts.sum: The Gunners must win at Old Trafford to keep their title hopes alive

arts.ttl: Arsenal in double team news hint for Man Utd as Mikel Arteta makes 'important' admission
arts.sum: The team news hints are also more likely to be true, considering Arsenal's injury woes under Arteta. Jorginho and Raheem Sterling are among the players who have posted pre-match graphics on their Instagram stories.
